title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 660.512 - Rulemaking under authority of chapter 210
text:
660.512.  Rulemaking under authority of chapter 210. — No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of chapter 210 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1989 S.B. 241 § 10, Repealed L. 1995 H.B. 574, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
